# refactor volumes and volume aliases

```
$ volumes -> volume
$ volume ls
$ volume ls ...id
$ volume attach ...id
$ volume clean
$ volume rm
```

```
grep --color=auto --exclude-dir={.bzr,CVS,.git,.hg,.svn,.idea,.tox} -> grep --color=auto
```
